title: Payload — cypherx.tenant.plan_changed
description: Contract 13 tenant-lifecycle payload. Emitted by Auth on a billing event from any billing adapter (Contract 19 emitter, e.g. px0 / Stripe / Chargebee). On consumption every service refreshes its quota tables per the new plan and invalidates its in-process quota cache immediately. Carried inside the Kafka event envelope `payload` field. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true).

new_plan.description: New plan identifier now in effect.

effective_from.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) from which the new plan applies.

source.description: Billing adapter / emitter that triggered the plan change (e.g. `px0`, `stripe`, `chargebee`).
